offer: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 clients/month, inefficient preparation causes late financial reporting. We automate the preparation of monthly financial statements instead of manual preparation using spreadsheets.
problem: inefficient preparation of monthly financial statements
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on financial workflows
DM outreach to small accounting firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try template-based financial statement generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Gather 10 short interviews from target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing financial data
